claim: The product roadmap already commits to a unified checkout redesign in Q3, so a new express-checkout proposal fits an existing roadmap initiative rather than opening net-new scope.
An ADR from last quarter decided the platform standardizes on the shared retry/backoff library, so any fix touching outbound calls must reuse that capability instead of adding bespoke retry logic.
Internal data-handling policy DH-07 prohibits storing raw payment identifiers outside the tokenization vault, which constrains how any checkout evidence may be persisted.
